{{Quote|The Lady deals with all assortment of items. Anything from a CDEF to an imperial T-21.|[[Sneg]], about [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Valarian/Legends|Valarian]]|<ref name="SWG" />}}
The '''CDEF carbine''' was a very basic, low cost [[Blaster carbine/Legends|carbine]] weapon used during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Corellian Security Force]] was known to incorporate the CDEF carbine and other CDEF weaponry into their arsenal.<ref name="SWG" />
[[File:CDEFCarbine.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Another view of a CDEF carbine]]

Other blasters in the CDEF series were the [[CDEF blaster pistol]] and the [[CDEF rifle]].<ref name="SWG" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
